title: USDZ Package Diagnostics Productions

diagnostics.meaning: ZIP structure is missing, truncated, multi-disk, or out of bounds
Zip64 metadata is present; this initial reader covers standard ZIP only
an entry uses a compression method other than stored
an entry sets the ZIP encryption flag
an entry's local file data does not start on a 64-byte boundary
an entry or explicit request uses an unsafe package path
two central directory entries normalize to the same package path
whole-package open found no first physical file entry
an explicit package entry was not present
the selected package entry is not .usda or .usdc
the selected package entry is itself .usdz

laws: diagnostics must be emitted before invoking USDA or USDC parsing when the package layout or selected entry is invalid
diagnostics that refer to a package entry should include the normalized entry path when available
